title: Animorphs
description: Adds new type of items - Transformation Items, those grant various abilities to player.
body:
Requires Fabric Language Kotlin.

The mod adds new unique type of items - Transformation Items.

For example, the Bee Transformation - allows slow flying, negates fall damage and grants some jump boost.
However, you drown much faster in the water when bee transformation is on.

Or... Magma Cube Transformation! Allows jumping quite high, negates fall damage and grants fire resistance.
However, you die in water as fast as in lava without fire resistance.

There's also few more interesting transformations. :)

Most transformation skins were taken from namemc
